links.targetTitle: Adapter package organizes Swarm integration into src/channel/, src/swarm-client.ts, src/swarm-crypto.ts, and src/plugin/

global.title: adapter/src/ infrastructure modules wrap Bee APIs, wallet-derived crypto, stamps, ACT sharing, and low-level store interfaces for the channel layer.
global.content:
## `adapter/src/` root (infrastructure kept from previous plugin)

```
adapter/src/
  swarm-client.ts           - Bee API: /bytes, /bzz, feeds, ACT, PSS, GSOC, node status
  swarm-crypto.ts           - AES-256-GCM encryption
  wallet-signer.ts          - Key derivation from wallet signature
  stamp-manager.ts          - Postage stamp lifecycle + CoinGecko pricing
  share-manager.ts          - Cross-user ACT sharing + public profile I/O
  folder-tree.ts            - Recursive tree builder
  types.ts                  - Manifest, sharing (ACT v2), stamp status
  swarm-operation-store.ts  - IOperationStore interface
  swarm-keyframe-store.ts   - IKeyframeStore interface
  bytes-utils.ts            - hex/bytes conversion
```

### Role

These modules are **infrastructure** — they pre-date the channel-based sync architecture but are still used underneath it.

- `swarm-client.ts` is the single Bee wrapper; everything above it goes through this client.
- `stamp-manager.ts` handles postage stamp purchase, top-up, and USD pricing.
- `share-manager.ts` abstracts ACT grantee management for the chat and document-share flows.
- `swarm-operation-store.ts` and `swarm-keyframe-store.ts` expose `IOperationStore` / `IKeyframeStore` interfaces — the contract between the channel layer and persistent Swarm storage.
global.description: swarm-client, swarm-crypto, wallet-signer, stamp-manager, share-manager, folder-tree, types, swarm-operation-store, swarm-keyframe-store, bytes-utils together.
